entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop targeted for nutritional improvement to combat malnutrition.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal grain crop targeted for nutritional improvement to combat malnutrition.

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health challenge in developing countries caused by diets with low micronutrient concentration.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The concentration of micro- and macro-nutrients in the edible parts of plants.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing micronutrient concentration in plant edible parts through genetic means.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of developing improved cultivars with superior traits through classical and advanced methods.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The use of advanced genomic tools to enhance the nutritional value of crops.

entities.name: CROSSING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding activities used to mainstream high micronutrient density traits into core breeding.

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where malnutrition due to low micronutrient diets is a major challenge.
